creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 253708
Patch for json-c

* PORTVERSION --> DISTVERSION
* Remove LOCAL/sunpoet from MASTER_SITES
* Use cmake:testing
* Remove unnecessary and conflicting definions in CMAKE_OFF and CMAKE_ON
* No need to force NEWLOCALE_NEEDS_FREELOCALE [1]
* Stop installing include/json-c/json_object_private.h
* Modernize port Makefile

1: https://github.com/json-c/json-c/issues/668

Compile and runtime tested on FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist, make test)

Poudriere testport OK 13.3-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 14.0-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 14.0-RELEASE (i386)
Poudriere testport OK 14.1-RELEASE (amd64)
